title: Pietermaritzburg, KwaZulu-Natal — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Pietermaritzburg, KwaZulu-Natal: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Pietermaritzburg is a city in KwaZulu-Natal with a population of 618,000. The capital of KwaZulu-Natal, known for its Victorian architecture, gardens, and historic Midlands Meander.

Last updated: July 13, 2026
